title: Move the grind and the ratio.
subtitle: An educational heuristic based on extraction theory. Useful to understand whether your recipe will lean more acidic, more bitter, or fuller-bodied.
state_sub: You’ll likely get more pronounced acidity and a lighter body. Try grinding finer or slightly increasing the ratio.
state_bal: Sweet spot: more sweetness and clarity in the cup.
state_over: Bitterness or astringency may show up. Try grinding coarser or shortening the ratio.
note: Note: This is an educational heuristic, not a physical measurement.
